title: lagerstroemia noei
intro: Lagerstroemia noei, also known as the Queen's Crape Myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lagerstroemia noei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Lagerstroemia noei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
